source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/Safety 접수자료 231219/8. 회로도/Switch_Box/SCH_SWITCH_BOX_BOARD_V1.0.pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung proprietary switch box board circuit schematic for iu_v2, revision/dev step DV v1.0.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Circuit schematic package for switch box board design and RA/safety submission traceability.
keyPoints: Contains cover sheet and schematic sheets for power, signal, and block diagram details.
States compliance with threshold of substances specified in 0QA-2049.
Marked Samsung proprietary and confidential, not to be disclosed or duplicated except as authorized by Samsung.
Includes electronic components such as STM32F101T6U6A, FT232RL, ACPL-M61L, LT3580EMS8E#PBF, and LM1117MPX-3.3.

reviewFlags.reason: Document date is not set because multiple sheet timestamps appear and no single official document date is identified.
Authority or jurisdiction is inferred only from Samsung proprietary markings; no regulatory authority is named.
Product signal ADD/AspenView appears in metadata but not in the source text, so it is not listed as a product model.
OCR/text extraction quality is low: repeated headers, unknown fields, fragmented schematic text, and misspellings such as SAMSUNG ELECTRONIS and blok diagram.
